settings.section_details:
accordion_title:
💡 What’s new about the formula?accordion_content:
We’ve updated our aerosol deodorant formula to give you better performance than ever. Expect smoother application, faster drying, and longer-lasting odor and protection—all while keeping the scent you already love.  


accordion_title:
🌿 Has the scent changed? 
accordion_content:
Not at all. The scent is exactly the same. If you're a fan of the fragrance, you're going to feel right at home.

accordion_title:
🧪 Why was the formula updated?
accordion_content:
We’re always improving. The new formula is the result of innovation and feedback from customers like you. It’s designed to deliver even better freshness and comfort throughout the day.

accordion_title:
⚗️ Why is it now aluminum-free?
accordion_content:We’ve made the switch to an aluminum-free formula in response to growing demand for more natural, skin-conscious personal care. While traditional antiperspirants use aluminum to block sweat, our new formula is designed to neutralize odor effectively without clogging pores—allowing your skin to breathe naturally, while keeping you fresh all day.

accordion_title:
🤍 Is it gentle on skin?
accordion_content:
Yes! Our new formula is made to be kind to your skin. It’s free from harsh ingredients and suitable for most skin types.

accordion_title:
⏱️ How long does it last?
accordion_content:The new formula offers all-day odor protection. Whether it’s a long workday or a workout, we’ve got you covered.
accordion_title:

🌬️ Does it feel different when I spray it?
accordion_content:Slightly. You might notice a drier, more even spray that feels lighter and absorbs quicker. It’s a small tweak with a big comfort upgrade.

accordion_title:
📦 Any change to the packaging?
accordion_content:Yes—it’s had a sleek refresh! The updated formula now comes in a smaller, more streamlined can that’s easier to hold and carry. Same great product inside, just in a more modern and convenient design.

accordion_title:
💸 Is it more expensive?
accordion_content:Yes, the new deodorant is priced slightly higher than before—but with good reason. You’re getting an upgraded formula with enhanced odor protection, faster drying, and a more refined application experience. It’s a premium upgrade designed to give you more from every spray.

accordion_title:
🙋 What if I liked the old version better?
accordion_content:We think you’ll love this one even more. But if you have any feedback, we’re always listening. Your opinion helps us get better every time.

accordion_title: How can I contact The Village Company? accordion_content: For general questions, support, or if you need help finding a product, please email us at info@thevillagecompany.com. PLEASE NOTE, we are currently experiencing issues with our phone lines. accordion_title: Shipping Information accordion_content: We ship non-aerosol online orders to all 50 states and the District of Columbia. Shipping charges are determined by shipping weight and order total by dollar amount. Please refer to the rate chart and options below for more details. Orders for in-stock items usually ship within 2-4 business days. For orders of 25 items or more, please allow an additional 1-3 days for processing.

Due to the pressurized nature of aerosol cans our Soft & Dri Classic aerosol spray, Mr. Bubble Foam Soap and VN Wellness Hydrate Cooling spray can only be shipped via ground delivery to the 48 contiguous United States.

Orders are processed Monday through Friday, excluding major holidays. accordion_title: Shipping Rates & Delivery Timing accordion_content: 0-4.99 lbs expedited shipping $8.00 (1-4 days processing, 1-2 days shipping, total delivery time 2-6 days)

5-25 lbs expedited shipping $10.00 (1-4 days processing, 1-2 days shipping, total delivery time 2-6 days)

Order Total of above $35.00 ground shipping $5.00 (1-4 days processing, 2-7 days shipping, total delivery time 4-11 days)

Order Total of above $50.00 ground shipping FREE (1-4 days processing, 2-5 days shipping, total delivery time 4-9 days) accordion_title: Returns & Refunds accordion_content: Our policy lasts 30 days. If 30 days have gone by since your purchase, unfortunately we can’t offer you a refund or exchange. To be eligible for a return, your item must be unused and in the same condition that you received it. It must also be in the original packaging. To complete your return, we require a receipt or proof of purchase.

To return your product, please mail your product and proof of purchase to: Customer Service, The Village Company, LLC, 10000 Valley View Road, Eden Prairie MN 55344, United States. You will be responsible for paying for your own shipping costs for returning your item. Original shipping costs on your order are non-refundable.

Once your return is received, we will send you an email to notify you that we have received your returned item and are processing your return. You will be refunded in the original method of payment within 8-10 business days. accordion_title: Are products shipped and sold outside of the United States? accordion_content:Currently, we do not offer shipping outside of the United Sates. However, you can find our products in stores in the following countries: South Korea, Taiwan, Japan, Trinidad, Bermuda and Thailand. accordion_title: PO Box Addresses accordion_content: We currently do not ship to PO Box addresses. accordion_title: Where can I get product coupons and learn about special promotions? accordion_content:The best way to receive product coupons and learn about special promotions is to sign up for our email newsletters, where we regularly notify you when there is a sale or a discount code you can redeem. You can also stay up to date on sales and promotions by connecting with us on our social media pages.

The Village Company is committed to diversity, inclusion and accessibility. These core values are fundamental to the way we do business. We are continuously taking steps to improve The Village Company.com and ensure it complies with the best practices and accessibility standards, including the Website Content Accessibility Guidelines 2.1 Levels A and AA success criteria. We are always continuing to evaluate and improve the accessibility of our website.

If you have an accessibility-related question, comment or problem, please contact our Customer Care representative via email at info@thevillagecompany.com with "Disabled Access" in the subject line and provide a description of what you feel is not fully accessible or a suggestion for improvement. We take your feedback seriously and will consider it as we evaluate ways to accommodate all of our customers and our overall accessibility policies.

accordion_title:
What Type of Product Subscriptions Do you Have?
accordion_content: Currently we offer single item subscriptions on select products. Select your frequency on the product page and we'll automatically deliver them so you never run out. You'll save on each item and only pay once your order ships. Order $50 or more and get free shipping.

accordion_title:
How Do I Make Changes To My Product Subscription Order?
accordion_content: You can manage or cancel your subscription by visiting 'Subscription Management.'
